title: lotononis schoenfelderi
intro: Lotononis schoenfelderi, also known as the Horse Shoe or Round Head, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the digestive system, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Lotononis schoenfelderi include its potential to alleviate symptoms of dysentery, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the roots or leaves in water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
